answer:
Marcus was created into a cyborg by Skynet to lure John Connor to its San Francisco base. Skynet designed him to appear human so he could infiltrate the Resistance and lead John into a trap. The goal was to kill John during the planned Resistance attack, which Skynet had manipulated through a false radio signal.

\boxed{\text{Marcus was created to lure John Connor to Skynet's base so that Skynet could kill him during the Resistance attack.}}
